name: io.github.Abhishekkumar2021/files
title: Files
description: Sandboxed local filesystem: read, search, edit, copy, archive, and safely manage files.

environmentVariables.name: FS_ROOTS
environmentVariables.description: Allowed root directories (comma-separated). Required — the server refuses to start without it.

environmentVariables.name: FS_READONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 or true to disable all file-modifying tools.
